tools.name: create_pull_request
tools.description: Creates a new pull request in the specified repository.

tools.name: list_issues
tools.description: Lists issues in the specified repository with optional filters.

parameters.name: state
parameters.description: Filter by state: open, closed, or all

tools.name: get_file_contents
tools.description: Retrieves the contents of a file from a repository at a specific ref.

parameters.name: path
parameters.description: Path to the file in the repository

parameters.name: ref
parameters.description: Git ref (branch, tag, or commit SHA)
